metadata.task_title: Convert a file (Excel) into a CSV file
metadata.instruction: Export the Task ID 59.xlsx in Documents > Task 59 folder to .csv and move it to Desktop.
metadata.context: I need to convert and export the Books Excel spreadsheet.

focused_element.name: Terminal 4, python Use Alt+F1 for terminal accessibility help

l3.rationale: Win key opens the Windows start/system window.

l4.rationale: Opened File Explorer, focused the address bar, entered the Documents\Task 59 path, and opened the target folder/item to reach the file location.

l5.rationale: The opening application and search-box interactions, plus list/window switching, are all part of finding Task ID 59.xlsx and getting it open.
